---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, incorrect, incomplete, or inconsistent documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

# Documentation Issue

## Affected Document

Provide the file path, publication identifier, section, heading, or link.

## Issue Type

Select or describe the issue type:

- typo or grammar;
- unclear wording;
- broken link;
- incorrect statement;
- missing explanation;
- terminology inconsistency;
- citation issue;
- formatting issue;
- outdated information;
- other.

## Current Text or Behavior

Quote only the minimum necessary text or describe the current documentation behavior.

## Proposed Correction

Describe the suggested correction or improvement.

## Normative Meaning

State whether the proposed change may affect normative meaning.

- No, editorial only.
- Yes, potentially normative.
- Uncertain; review required.

## Additional Context

Provide references, evidence, or related material.
